briefdescription.para: Encode PGN 129025 (Position, Rapid Update) into an 8-byte CAN frame.
Decode PGN 129025 (Position, Rapid Update) from an 8-byte CAN frame.
Encode PGN 129026 (COG & SOG, Rapid Update) into an 8-byte CAN frame.
Decode PGN 129026 (COG & SOG, Rapid Update) from an 8-byte CAN frame.
Encode PGN 127250 (Vessel Heading) into an 8-byte CAN frame.
Decode PGN 127250 (Vessel Heading) from an 8-byte CAN frame.
Encode PGN 127508 (Battery Status) into an 8-byte CAN frame.
Decode PGN 127508 (Battery Status) from an 8-byte CAN frame.
Encode PGN 127506 (DC Detailed Status) into an 8-byte CAN frame.
Decode PGN 127506 (DC Detailed Status) from an 8-byte CAN frame.
Encode PGN 130310 (Environmental Parameters) into an 8-byte CAN frame.
Decode PGN 130310 (Environmental Parameters) from an 8-byte CAN frame.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_N2K_FastPacketRx *rx, const SYN_CAN_Frame *frame, uint32_t target_pgn, const uint8_t **out_payload, size_t *out_len)
memberdef.name: syn_n2k_fastpacket_process

briefdescription.para: Process an incoming CAN frame in the Fast-Packet multi-frame RX reassembler.

parameterdescription.para: Expected target PGN for the Fast-Packet message.
Output pointer receiving reassembled payload buffer.
Output length of payload in bytes.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK if payload complete, or SYN_BUSY if Fast-Packet frames are still pending.

detaileddescription.para: Implements NMEA 2000 (IEC 61162-3) marine CAN bus PGN encoders, decoders, and Fast-Packet multi-frame transport protocol reassembly.
